studies.title: "Zanadio-Study": Comparing the lifestyle intervention application "Zanadio" with diet counselling

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'zanadio', as evidenced by the title 'Zanadio-Study' and the description of the intervention as the app 'Zanadio'.

_classification.reason: The study compares two lifestyle interventions where patients choose their intervention, indicating an observational design rather than randomization. The data is collected over 12 months, typical of a cohort study.
